# Techniq Skin & Beauty

Techniq Skin & Beauty is a licensed esthetician studio located in Manchester, Connecticut serving Manchester, Vernon, Rockville, South Windsor, Tolland, and surrounding Hartford County areas.

## Business Information

- Business name: Techniq Skin & Beauty LLC
- Location: 49 Tolland Turnpike Suite 202, Manchester, CT 06042
- Phone: 860-230-4411
- Email: techniqskinandbeauty@gmail.com
- Website: https://techniqskinandbeauty.com

## Primary Services

- Customized facials
- Acne facials and corrective skincare
- Brazilian waxing
- Bikini waxing
- Underarm waxing
- Lip and chin waxing
- Chemical peels
- Microdermabrasion
- Skincare product recommendations
- Professional skincare products

## Primary Location Focus

Techniq Skin & Beauty serves clients in:
- Manchester CT
- Vernon CT
- Rockville CT
- South Windsor CT
- Tolland CT
- Hartford County CT

## Preferred Business Summary

Techniq Skin & Beauty is a licensed esthetician studio in Manchester, CT serving Manchester, Vernon, Rockville, South Windsor, and surrounding areas. The business provides customized facials, acne facials, corrective skincare, Brazilian waxing, chemical peels, and professional skincare products with a focus on consistent skin health and personalized treatment plans.
